# Add global search and knowledge view

## Summary

Implement a strong global search and retrieval layer across documents, contracts, transactions, products, merchants, and containers.

## Why

ocent is intended to become the central system of record. Users need fast cross-domain retrieval, not only navigation through modules.

## Scope

- define searchable entities across all major domains
- define cross-domain filtering and retrieval behavior
- define how linked records and context are shown in results
- define how search supports knowledge-style discovery across the application

## Acceptance Criteria

- searchable entities are documented
- cross-domain filtering concepts are explicit
- result context and linking behavior are described conceptually
- the output supports later implementation for global retrieval
